coverage_note: This is a cleaned foundation dataset, not a complete list of Australian schools.

provenance.source: Legacy imported schools.json records in this repository.
provenance.rank_scope: Unknown legacy scope; rank is within the current dataset only until a sourced ranking methodology is added.
provenance.score_scope: Unknown legacy score; score is retained as an imported reference field and is not an authoritative national score.
provenance.naplan: Not collected in this phase. The ACARA public Data Access Program profile/location/enrolment files used here do not include NAPLAN result scores.

acara_public_data.source: ACARA Data Access Program public download files
acara_public_data.note: Official ACARA identity, profile, location and enrolment data is being added via conservative deterministic matching. It does not replace the current legacy score/rank methodology yet.

fields.local_id: Deterministic local identifier generated from school_name + postcode + state; intended to remain stable until mapped to an external identifier such as ACARA ID.
fields.sector: Current taxonomy preserves source-supported Government / Non-government only. Future taxonomy may split Non-government into Catholic / Independent when source data supports it.
fields.rank: Legacy imported rank; display as rank in current dataset, not national rank.
fields.score: Legacy imported score; display as current dataset reference value.
fields.acara_matching: In progress: local_id records are mapped to ACARA public records where deterministic name/postcode/state or name/suburb/state matching is unambiguous; ambiguous candidates remain labelled as candidates.
